buildCommand: cd client && npm install --include=dev --legacy-peer-deps && NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 npx vite build
installCommand: cd server && npm install && npx prisma generate && npx prisma db push --skip-generate --accept-data-loss

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://*.clerk.accounts.dev https://challenges.cloudflare.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://*.googleusercontent.com https://lh3.googleusercontent.com https://drive.google.com https://*.clerk.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.clerk.accounts.dev https://*.clerk.com https://api.clerk.com; frame-src https://*.clerk.accounts.dev https://challenges.cloudflare.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self';
